body_txt: The sun is a mass of incandescent gas note actually a miasma of incandescent plasma . Or possibly a chariot wheel, a very large flashlight, or a two-dimensional painting on the cosmic backdrop that is the sky. Forget everything you know about Mr. Sun note And in several languages — and in J. R. R. Tolkien 's Middle-earth — it's Ms. Sun, thank you very much. because, in Fiction Land, it's all wrong. Unlike Weird Moon , the occurrence of these is rarer, except in animations where they're more common. Common oddities: Related to Weird Moon . A subtrope of Artistic License – Space , and a supertrope of The Face of the Sun . See also Artificial Sun .
